title: Add PolliCross to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PolliCross](https://zqigolden.github.io/pollicross/) to games
- PolliCross is a web-based Picross / Nonogram puzzle game where every level is generated from an AI image. The player enters a text prompt and picks an art style, and the app calls the Pollinations ima

Fixes #11947

gist.headline: Prompt your own puzzles
gist.blurb: A new community game just dropped! PolliCross lets you generate custom Picross puzzles from AI images using your own text prompts.
gist.summary: Added PolliCross to the community apps directory, a web-based Picross/Nonogram game that generates playable puzzle levels from AI images via the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Players can now generate and solve custom nonogram puzzles based on any text prompt and art style they choose.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot playing a Picross/Nonogram puzzle game. A grid with numbers on the side, with some squares filled in to reveal a pixel art picture. The bee is holding a giant pencil or stylus, actively solving the puzzle.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a giant wooden pencil, solving a glowing Picross nonogram puzzle on a retro computer screen. The puzzle grid shows partially filled squares revealing a pixelated flower. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a giant wooden pencil, solving a glowing Picross nonogram puzzle on a retro computer screen. The puzzle grid shows partially filled squares revealing a pixelated flower. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
